title: chrysanthemum achilleoides
intro: Chrysanthemum achilleoides, also known as Golden Yarrow, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is a perennial herb with golden yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, thanks to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. The herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum achilleoides include teas, infusions, and dried flowers, which can be used to make medicinal remedies for various health ailments.
